channel.title: GitHub Blade Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Blade in GitHub

item.title: grocy/grocy
item.description: ERP beyond your fridge - Grocy is a web-based self-hosted groceries & household management solution for your home

item.title: lsky-org/lsky-pro
item.description: ☁️兰空图床(Lsky Pro) - Your photo album on the cloud.

item.title: creativetimofficial/soft-ui-dashboard-laravel
item.description: Soft UI Dashboard Laravel - Free full stack dashboard app

item.title: Prajwal100/Complete-Ecommerce-in-laravel-10
item.description: Complete e-commerce website in laravel 10. Admin login:- https://ketramart.com/admin/login
